message.abstract:
<jats:title>Abstract</jats:title>
                <jats:p>A sero-prevalence survey in Delhi measured an infection rate of 23.48% and an implied infection fatality rate (IFR) of 0.06%. Modeling using age group based IFRs from France, Spain and Lombardia project an average IFR that is significantly higher than currently estimated. We show that at least 1500-2500 COVID-19 deaths in the 60+ age group are missing.</jats:p>
title: Estimating missing deaths in Delhi’s COVID-19 data
